affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司

backstory.original: Omin Dran built the organization called Acquisitions Incorporated to facilitate his quest to find his true sister, at least in part. Despite his unprecedented success in establishing the market for franchised adventuring across the Sword Coast and beyond, Omin's full measure eludes most people. He is known to be a worshiper of Tymora, ruthless in matters of business, feckless in matters of love, and hopeless in games of chance. He is often accused of being a Masked Lord of Waterdeep, though that would explain some things...
backstory.display: 欧敏·德兰建立了名为艾奎兹玄有限责任公司的组织，以帮助自己寻找他真正的妹妹，至少这是他的一部分理由。尽管他在建立整个剑湾的特许冒险市场方面取得空前成功，但大多数人都不了解欧敏的情况。众所周知，他是泰摩拉的崇拜者。在生意上冷酷无情，在爱情上无动于衷，在运气游戏上毫无希望。他经常被认为是深水城的幕后操纵者，尽管这样一来有些事就说得通了......

description.original: Omin smashes the nearest enemy with his maul.
description.display: 欧敏用他的双手锤猛砸距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Omin summons 15 Spirit Guardians which damage a random area every 2 seconds.
description.display: 欧敏召唤 15 个魂灵守护者，每 2 秒对一个随机区域造成伤害。

longDescription.original: Omin summons 15 Spirit Guardians which explode every 2 seconds, damaging all monsters in a large area. The effect of Champion of Tymora is increased as long as a Spirit remains.
longDescription.display: 欧敏召唤 15 个魂灵守护者，每 2 秒产生爆炸，对大范围的所有怪物造成伤害。只要还有魂灵存在，“泰摩拉的勇士”效果提高。

conditions.desc: Omin recruits adjacent Champions, Champions affiliated with Acquisitions Incorporated and/or The "C" Team, and Champions adjacent to an Acquisitions Incorporated or "C" Team member to be Champions of Tymora. Champions of Tymora have their damage increased by $(amount)%. Omin himself is also a Champion of Tymora.
Omin recruits all adjacent Champions to be Champions of Tymora. Champions of Tymora have their damage increased by $(amount)%. Omin himself is also a Champion of Tymora.
欧敏会招募相邻勇士、与艾奎兹玄有限责任公司和/或 C 小队有关联的勇士、与艾奎兹玄有限责任公司或 C 小队成员相邻的勇士，使他们成为泰摩拉的勇士。泰摩拉的勇士伤害提升 $(amount)%。欧敏自己也是一名泰摩拉的勇士。
欧敏会招募所有相邻勇士成为泰摩拉的勇士。泰摩拉的勇士伤害提升 $(amount)%。欧敏自己也是一名泰摩拉的勇士。

tipText.original: Omin recruits all adjacent Champions to be Champions of Tymora and increases their damage.
tipText.display: 欧敏会招募所有相邻勇士成为泰摩拉的勇士，并提高其伤害。

description.desc: Omin increases the party's gold find by $(amount)% each time a Champion of Tymora attacks an enemy, stacking additively.
每当一名泰摩拉的勇士攻击敌人，欧敏就使队伍找到的金币提升 $(amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Omin increases the party's gold find each time a Champion of Tymora attacks.
tipText.display: 每当一名泰摩拉的勇士攻击敌人，欧敏就使队伍的金币寻获量增加。

description.desc: Champions who are affiliated with Acquisitions Incorporated and/or The "C" Team also become Champions of Tymora, and recruit Champions adjacent to them as well.
与艾奎兹玄有限责任公司和/或 C 小队有关联的勇士也会成为泰摩拉的勇士，并且会招募与自己相邻的勇士。
Champions of Tymora are healed for $(amount) health per second.
泰摩拉的勇士每秒得到 $(amount) 点生命值的治疗。
Omin increases the effect of Champion of Tymora by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion of Tymora in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位泰摩拉的勇士，欧敏就使“泰摩拉的勇士”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Omin increases his damage buff based on the number of Champions of Tymora in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 欧敏依据阵型中泰摩拉的勇士的数量强化伤害增益。

description.desc: Omin increases the effect of Champion of Tymora by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Acquisitions Incorporated and/or The "C" Team champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: Acq. Inc. and "C" Team Champions in Formation: $num_stacks

description.desc: 阵型中每有一位艾奎兹玄有限责任公司和/或 C 小队勇士，欧敏就使“泰摩拉的勇士”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司和 C 小队勇士

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的艾奎兹玄有限责任公司和 C 小队勇士：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Omin increases his damage buff based on the number of Acquisitions Incorporated and "C" Team champions in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 欧敏依据阵型中艾奎兹玄有限责任公司和“C”小队勇士的数量强化伤害增益。

description.desc: Omin increases the effect of Champion of Tymora by $(amount)% for every 10 stacks of Adventuring Capital, stacking additively.
每有 10 层“冒险资本”，欧敏就使“泰摩拉的勇士”效果提升 $(amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Omin increases his damage buff based on the number of Adventuring Capital stacks he has.
specializationDescription.display: 欧敏依据拥有的“探险资本”堆叠层数强化伤害增益。

description.desc: The effect of Champion of Tymora is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each order of magnitude of Gold you have collected in the current adventure, stacking multiplicatively.
你在这次冒险中每收集到一个数量级的金币，泰摩拉的勇士效果就提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

description.original: Yes. Yes. Very true. Indeed.
description.display: 是的，是的，非常真实。确实。

description.original: Do it for that fresh parchment smell! No? Just me?
description.display: 为了那新鲜羊皮纸的味道战斗吧！不？只有我愿意吗？

description.original: Liar.
description.display: 说谎者。

description.original: The council has grown as of late.
description.display: 议会的规模最近扩大了。

description.original: Not all labors are physical.
description.display: 并非所有劳工都是体力活。

description.original: Check page 243 subsection J, please. I'll wait.
description.display: 请看看第 243 页 J 条款，我等着。

description.original: I have it on good authority that this is a wise call.
description.display: 我有充分的理由认为这是一个明智的决定。

description.original: Let's all come to order.
description.display: 大家各就各位。

description.original: Q3 adventures are looking good!
description.display: 第三季度的冒险看起来不错！

description.original: It's been proven that listening to me can make me richer.
description.display: 事实证明，听我说话可以让我更富有。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Omin's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Now about your adventuring fees...
description.display: 关于你的冒险费用......

description.original: Let's magic circle back to your gold performance in this party.
description.display: 让我们用魔法阵来回顾你在探险队中的金币寻获表现吧。

description.original: Have you filled out Cure Light Wounds Form B in triplicate?
description.display: 你有没有填写过一式三份的《轻伤治疗表格 B》？

description.original: I've got the HP of at least four CEOs.
description.display: 我的生命值相当于至少四位 CEO。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Omin's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Did you bring the paperwork?
description.display: 你有带文件来吗？

description.original: Finally! I knew diversifying my investments would eventually pay off.
description.display: 终于成功了！我就知道分散投资最终会有回报的。

description.original: I'd suggest, perhaps, grabbing a sturdier weapon.
description.display: 或许我可以建议换一个比较牢固的武器。

description.original: Has it been used, or has it been wielded? Completely different things.
description.display: 这个二手武器是在战斗中使用过的还是只是有过主人而已？那是截然不同的两回事。

description.original: All our notaries have these.
description.display: 我们的每一位公证人都有此盖章。

description.original: Fortunate for me, anyway. You might like it less.
description.display: 对我来说是幸运的地方。对你来说可能就不是了。

description.original: Smuggled HOW, is the question.
description.display: 怎么走私的？这才是关键。

description.original: In case of Rust Monster, throw coin.
description.display: 要是碰见锈蚀怪，记得掷硬币。

description.original: I mean, let's be honest. We have a lot to commemorate.
description.display: 不是我说，我们真的有很多值得纪念的经历。

description.original: Prove it.
description.display: 证明自己吧。

description.original: It's the breathable cotton that make these a great midsummer pauldron.
description.display: 护肩下的透气软垫才是夏天也适合穿着它们的关键。

description.original: I wear these when we open a new franchise. You know? Make it special.
description.display: 我们开新分店时我穿过。当时就是为了搞点特殊的气氛。

description.original: She's always had her eye on me. And my life is proof.
description.display: 她总是那么的关注我。我的一生就是最佳证明。

description.original: I'm not NOT an Open Lord, if you know what I mean.
description.display: 我可不是什么公开领主哦。

description.original: This was back when I was trying to convince my mom I owned our house! I was four. Good times.
description.display: 这份合约是我四岁时试图说服我妈房子是属于我的时候立下的。过去的好时光啊。

description.original: Ms. Dawngrass never fails to deliver.
description.display: 多恩格斯小姐从来没让人失望过。

description.original: I have a reputation for violence, but in truth? Most of it happens on paper.
description.display: 人们都认为我崇尚暴力，但其实呢？我的暴力主要都是体现在纸面上。

description.original: I keep hold of this for my mom.
description.display: 这是我为我妈保管的。

description.original: It's just... sticking right out, huh? That does not match the blueprints I approved.
description.display: 这玩意有点......格格不入吧？根本不符合我批准的蓝图。

description.original: I thought we talked about this.
description.display: 我们之前不是谈好的吗？

description.original: Usually you can't drink BETWEEN pubs.
description.display: 现在不用到酒馆也能喝酒了。

description.original: Hey, buddy.
description.display: 嘿，兄弟。

description.original: I've got a LOT of ideas, and I put them right in here.
description.display: 我有太多的想法，所以会把它们都记下来。

description.original: The first draft of our Employee Manual.
description.display: 这是我们的员工手册的草案初稿。

description.original: Welcome to Acquisitions Incorporated.
description.display: 欢迎光临艾奎兹玄有限责任公司。

description.original: Given to me by a cloaked gith, who immediately disintegrated? Maybe from the future? Haven't cracked this puzzle yet.
description.display: 这是某位披着斗篷的吉斯洋基人送我的，随后他就瞬间消失了。或许他是来自未来的人？我至今还没猜透这个谜。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Half-Elf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Omin Dran built the organization called Acquisitions Incorporated to facilitate his quest to find his true sister, at least in part. Despite his unprecedented success in establishing the market for franchised adventuring across the Sword Coast and beyond, Omin's full measure eludes most people. He is known to be a worshiper of Tymora, ruthless in matters of business, feckless in matters of love, and hopeless in games of chance. He is often accused of being a Masked Lord of Waterdeep, though that would explain some things...
character_sheet_details.system_description: Omin recruits his fellow Champions to become Champions of Tymora, who themselves can recruit additional Champions of Tymora, and so on, until the entire formation is chanting praise of Omin's goddess of good fortune.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 欧敏·德兰建立了名为艾奎兹玄有限责任公司的组织，以帮助自己寻找他真正的妹妹，至少这是他的一部分理由。尽管他在建立整个剑湾的特许冒险市场方面取得空前成功，但大多数人都不了解欧敏的情况。众所周知，他是泰摩拉的崇拜者。在生意上冷酷无情，在爱情上无动于衷，在运气游戏上毫无希望。他经常被认为是深水城的幕后操纵者，尽管这样一来有些事就说得通了......
character_sheet_details.system_description: 欧敏可以召集他的同伴成为泰摩拉的勇士，同伴们又可以召集更多泰摩拉的勇士。以此类推，直至整个阵型都开始赞美欧敏的幸运女神。

original.name: I'm a Man in Finance
original.description: Did you bring the paperwork?

display.name: 我是金融业人士
display.description: 你有带文件来吗？

original.name: To the Moon
original.description: Finally! I knew diversifying my investments would eventually pay off.

display.name: 奔向月球
display.description: 终于成功了！我就知道分散投资最终会有回报的。

original.name: Common Mace
original.description: I'd suggest, perhaps, grabbing a sturdier weapon.

display.name: 普通的钉头锤
display.description: 或许我可以建议换一个比较牢固的武器。

original.name: Used Mace
original.description: Has it been used, or has it been wielded? Completely different things.

display.name: 二手钉头锤
display.description: 这个二手武器是在战斗中使用过的还是只是有过主人而已？那是截然不同的两回事。

original.name: Stamp of Approval
original.description: All our notaries have these.

display.name: 认可盖章
display.description: 我们的每一位公证人都有此盖章。

original.name: Tymora's Club of Fortune
original.description: Fortunate for me, anyway. You might like it less.

display.name: 泰摩拉的命运俱乐部
display.description: 对我来说是幸运的地方。对你来说可能就不是了。

original.name: Smuggled Coin
original.description: Smuggled HOW, is the question.

display.name: 走私硬币
display.description: 怎么走私的？这才是关键。

original.name: Ferrous Metal Snack
original.description: In case of Rust Monster, throw coin.

display.name: 含铁金属零食
display.description: 要是碰见锈蚀怪，记得掷硬币。

original.name: Commemorative Coin
original.description: I mean, let's be honest. We have a lot to commemorate.

display.name: 纪念性硬币
display.description: 不是我说，我们真的有很多值得纪念的经历。

original.name: Challenge Coin
original.description: Prove it.

display.name: 挑战硬币
display.description: 证明自己吧。

original.name: Shoulder Pads
original.description: It's the breathable cotton that make these a great midsummer pauldron.

display.name: 护肩
display.description: 护肩下的透气软垫才是夏天也适合穿着它们的关键。

original.name: Dress Pauldron
original.description: I wear these when we open a new franchise. You know? Make it special.

display.name: 连衣裙肩甲
display.description: 我们开新分店时我穿过。当时就是为了搞点特殊的气氛。

original.name: Eyes of Tymora Armor
original.description: She's always had her eye on me. And my life is proof.

display.name: 泰摩拉之目护甲
display.description: 她总是那么的关注我。我的一生就是最佳证明。

original.name: Pauldron of the Open Lord
original.description: I'm not NOT an Open Lord, if you know what I mean.

display.name: 公开领主的肩甲
display.description: 我可不是什么公开领主哦。

original.name: Child's Contract
original.description: This was back when I was trying to convince my mom I owned our house! I was four. Good times.

display.name: 孩童合约
display.description: 这份合约是我四岁时试图说服我妈房子是属于我的时候立下的。过去的好时光啊。

original.name: Letter from Walnut
original.description: Ms. Dawngrass never fails to deliver.

display.name: 沃纳特的来信
display.description: 多恩格斯小姐从来没让人失望过。

original.name: Notarized Legal Discourse
original.description: I have a reputation for violence, but in truth? Most of it happens on paper.

display.name: 公证法律话语
display.description: 人们都认为我崇尚暴力，但其实呢？我的暴力主要都是体现在纸面上。

original.name: Dran & Courtier Title
original.description: I keep hold of this for my mom.

display.name: 德朗与追求者头衔
display.description: 这是我为我妈保管的。

original.name: Self Drumroll
original.description: It's just... sticking right out, huh? That does not match the blueprints I approved.

display.name: 自动击鼓
display.description: 这玩意有点......格格不入吧？根本不符合我批准的蓝图。

original.description: I thought we talked about this.

display.name: 便携式炼金台
display.description: 我们之前不是谈好的吗？

original.name: Ambulatory Fermenter
original.description: Usually you can't drink BETWEEN pubs.

display.name: 流动发酵器
display.description: 现在不用到酒馆也能喝酒了。

original.description: Hey, buddy.

display.name: 酒桶格雷格
display.description: 嘿，兄弟。

original.name: Spellbook of Questions
original.description: Given to me by a cloaked gith, who immediately disintegrated? Maybe from the future? Haven't cracked this puzzle yet.

display.name: 问题魔法书
display.description: 这是某位披着斗篷的吉斯洋基人送我的，随后他就瞬间消失了。或许他是来自未来的人？我至今还没猜透这个谜。
